content.problemStatement:
Consider a string sss. The following operation can be performed on it successively several (possibly zero) times.


Select any non empty suffix of sss and append it to sss
For example, if s=abcds = \text{abcd}s=abcd, then sss can become either abcdd\text{abcdd}abcdd, abcdcd\text{abcdcd}abcdcd, abcdbcd\text{abcdbcd}abcdbcd or abcdabcd\text{abcdabcd}abcdabcd after one operation. Successive operations are now performed on the new string.

You are given a string ttt, the resultant string after applying several (possibly zero) operations on some string. You must find any such string sss of the **shortest** length from which ttt can be obtained after some sequence of operations. It can be proven that such a string always exists.


Input Format


The first line contains one number TTT, the number of test cases.




The only line of each test case contains the string ttt.





Output Format
For each test case print a string sss of the shortest possible length which satisfies the requirements. If there are multiple such strings, you may print any.
constraints: String ttt contains only lowercase english alphabets.
The total length of all the strings in the input is at most 2‚ãÖ1052 \cdot 10^52‚ãÖ105.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111: String ab\text{ab}ab satisfies the requirements.
ab\text{ab}ab ‚Üí\rightarrow‚Üí abb\text{abb}abb ‚Üí\rightarrow‚Üí abbabb\text{abbabb}abbabb ‚Üí\rightarrow‚Üí abbabbbabb\text{abbabbbabb}abbabbbabb
No string of length less than 222 exists from which abbabbbabb\text{abbabbbabb}abbabbbabb can be obtained after some operations.
Test case 222: String ab\text{ab}ab satisfies the requirements.
ab\text{ab}ab ‚Üí\rightarrow‚Üí abb\text{abb}abb ‚Üí\rightarrow‚Üí abbb\text{abbb}abbb ‚Üí\rightarrow‚Üí abbbabbb\text{abbbabbb}abbbabbb ‚Üí\rightarrow‚Üí abbbabbbb\text{abbbabbbb}abbbabbbb
Test case 333: String codechef\text{codechef}codechef satisfies the requirements.
codechef\text{codechef}codechef ‚Üí\rightarrow‚Üí codechefchef\text{codechefchef}codechefchef ‚Üí\rightarrow‚Üí codechefcheff\text{codechefcheff}codechefcheff
